name: build-lynx-apps
description: Build Lynx.js apps with official Lynx tooling, Lynx-native UI guidance, visual concept workflows, and optional app-service integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Build Lynx.js apps with official tooling, Lynx-native UI, and visual QA guidance
interface.longDescription: Use Build Lynx Apps to create Lynx.js application surfaces from image-generated concepts, route framework questions through official Lynx Docs and DevTool MCPs, compose UI with read-only @dumbooks/lynx-ui guidance, and optionally plan Stripe or Supabase/Postgres app-service integrations without UI-framework assumptions.
defaultPrompt: Build a polished Lynx.js app screen with a verified visual workflow.
